name: Context Therapeutics Inc.
business: Context Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing T cell engaging bispecific antibodies for solid tumors. Its lead product candidates include CTIM-76 (CLDN6 x CD3 TCE), CT-95 (MSLN x CD3 TCE), and CT-202 (Nectin-4 x CD3 TCE). The company has not yet commercialized any products and has no revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing T cell engaging ( TCE ) bispecific antibodies ( bsAb ) for solid tumors.

catalysts.event: Phase 1a interim data for CTIM-76 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to share Phase 1a interim data for the CTIM-76 trial in June 2026.

catalysts.event: Phase 1a interim data for CT-95 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to share Phase 1a interim data for the CT-95 trial in September 2026.

catalysts.event: First patient dose in CT-202 Phase 1 trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to dose the first patient in our CT-202 Phase 1 trial in the third quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Greater than 50,000 patients per year in the United States have CLDN6-positive relapse/refractory disease.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that greater than 50,000 patients per year in the United States have CLDN6-positive relapse/refractory ( R/R ) disease.

tamClaims.claim: Greater than 100,000 patients per year in the United States have mesothelin-positive relapse/refractory disease.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that greater than 100,000 patients per year in the United States have mesothelin-positive R/R disease.

tamClaims.claim: Greater than 125,000 patients per year in the United States have Nectin-4-positive relapse/refractory disease.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that greater than 125,000 patients per year in the United States have Nectin-4-positive R/R disease.
